meta.source: Global Index on Responsible AI (GIRAI) 2024 Edition
meta.note: Index score 0-100. thematic_areas = ta_score per thematic area (0-100). Includes near-zero scorers (countries doing little) — absence of movement IS represented, not missing.
meta.thematic_areas_note: ta_score per thematic area (0-100), merged from GIRAI 2024 Data tab. null = area not scored for that country.
